narrative:
Huron County has 35,451 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.3% of registrants.
